parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search term for course title or description

parameters.name: instructorId
parameters.description: Filter courses by one or more instructor ids. Supports multiple values (e.g., ?instructorId=id1&instructorId=id2)

get.description: Maybe removed or used in the future

200.description: Full course content with section and lesson references

reason.example: Course content does not meet quality requirements.

sectionId.description: ID of the section to move (must match the sectionId path parameter)

preOrder.description: order of the section you want to insert to

structure.description: Resulting course structure after moving the section, including all sections and their lessons

sectionId.description: ID of the section to move (must match the sectionId path parameter)

targetIndex.description: New index for the section within the course (0-based). For example, if targetIndex is 0, the section will be moved to the beginning of the course. If targetIndex is equal to the number of sections - 1, it will be moved to the end.

structure.description: Resulting course structure after moving the section, including all sections and their lessons

commentIdPath.name: commentId
commentIdPath.description: Unique identifier of the post comment

id.description: User ID from Authentik (need to change subject mode to User's ID instead of hashed)

Structure.description: Course structure with sections and their corresponding lessons. This is a read-only field that provides the organization of the course content.

overview.example: Learn practical Go backend concepts in this beginner-friendly course.

hasNext.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrev.description: Whether there is a previous page

more_info.description: URL with more information about the error

content.example: Encapsulation hides implementation details behind a stable API.

question.example: Which principle of OOP enables exposing only essential behavior?

content.example: This explanation of polymorphism is very clear.

example.message: The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax

schema.description: The error response body returned when JWT validation or OPA authorization fails.

type.description: The category of the error encountered during the middleware lifecycle.

details.description: A descriptive message providing technical context for the failure.

custom_message.description: An optional, developer-defined message, often populated by OPA policy violations.
custom_message.example: User does not have the required 'admin' role.
